properties.description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.

properties.displayName: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Web-based reconnaissance blocked by security controls
properties.description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
properties.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where FileName in~ ("whoami.exe", "net.exe", "nltest.exe", "ipconfig.exe", "systeminfo.exe")
| summarize ReconCount = count(),
    UniqueTools = dcount(FileName),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName
| where ReconCount >= 3 or UniqueTools >= 2
| sort by ReconCount desc
| take 100

properties.displayName: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Automated threat intelligence gathering attempt
properties.description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
properties.query:
SigninLogs
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ResultType != "0"
| summarize FailedCount = count(),
    UniqueIPs = dcount(IPAddress),
    UniqueLocations = dcount(Location),
    FirstAttempt = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastAttempt = max(TimeGenerated)
    by UserPrincipalName
| where FailedCount >= 5 or UniqueIPs >= 3
| sort by FailedCount desc
| take 100

properties.displayName: KTLYST - Behavioral Detection - Security control evasion attempt documentation
properties.description: Auto-generated by KTLYST from threat intelligence.
properties.query:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(24h)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any ("Set-MpPreference", "DisableRealtimeMonitoring", "-ep bypass")
    or FileName in~ ("reg.exe", "attrib.exe")
| summarize EventCount = count(),
    UniqueCommands = dcount(ProcessCommandLine),
    FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by DeviceName, AccountName
| sort by EventCount desc
| take 100
